name: PhosEnergy Limited
description: PhosEnergy Limited is an Australian-based company focused on the development and commercialization of innovative technologies within the nuclear and energy sectors. Originally established to extract uranium from phosphoric acid streams produced during phosphate fertilizer manufacturing, the company has evolved its portfolio to include advanced energy solutions. Now operating under the parent entity entX, PhosEnergy continues to leverage nuclear science and engineering to create sustainable, scalable technologies. Its work aims to provide environmental and economic benefits by transforming industrial processes and supporting the global transition toward cleaner, more efficient energy generation and resource recovery.
